name: panzanidesign-deployment
description: Scripts for building and deploying PanzaniDesign to AWS

scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:api && cd infrastructure && npm install && npx cdk deploy --all --require-approval never
scripts.deploy:api: npm run build:api && cd infrastructure && npx cdk deploy PanzaniDesignBackendStack
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run build:frontend && cd infrastructure && npx cdk deploy PanzaniDesignFrontendStack

author: Antigravity
